activity.description: Trigger when a new record is added in UiPath Data Fabric.

data.label: Document Intake
data.description: DUExtraction runs on case creation; produces documentPacket. Stage can be re-entered after Document Review approval.

inputs.name: documentPacket
inputs.description: JSON string with five sub-objects: bol, certificateOfOrigin, insuranceCertificate, cargoManifest, qualityCertificate. Each holds extracted fields in snake_case: voyage_id, vessel_name, shipper_name, consignee_name, origin_port_code, destination_port_code, cargo_description, gross_weight_kg, declared_value_usd, plus notify_party, issuing_country, policy_number, inspection_date, qc_officer where applicable.

outputs.name: docResult
outputs.description: PASS if all five consistency checks pass. REVIEW if exactly one document is missing/unreadable/malformed such that re-uploading it could fix the case. FAIL if documents hard-contradict each other or documentPacket is invalid JSON.

outputs.name: docComment
outputs.description: Concise sentence (no more than 20 words) explicitly naming the involved document(s) and the failure cause (or success on PASS).

outputs.name: flaggedDocument
outputs.description: The document key most directly responsible for the result. On REVIEW: the document to re-upload. On FAIL: the document carrying the conflicting/invalid value (treat BoL as canonical; manifest for weight delta; quality for date issues; the doc with the stale value for amendment failures). On PASS or invalid-JSON FAIL: empty string. Values: bol, manifest, coo, insurance, or quality.

inputs.name: shipper
inputs.description: Name of the shipping party
inputs.title: Shipper

inputs.name: consignee
inputs.description: Name of the receiving party
inputs.title: Consignee

inputs.name: vessel_operator
inputs.description: Name of the vessel operator
inputs.title: Vessel Operator

inputs.name: list_type
inputs.description: Optional. Use 'escalation' to switch to denied_party_list_escalation.csv. Leave blank to use the default list.
inputs.title: List Type

outputs.name: partyComment
outputs.description: One human-readable sentence summarising the screening
outputs.title: Party Comment

data.label: Released

inputs.name: releaseOutcome
inputs.description: The final release decision, already determined upstream. One of: RELEASED, RELEASED_WITH_OVERRIDE, REJECTED.

inputs.name: docResult
inputs.description: Document verification verdict: PASS, FAIL, or REVIEW.

inputs.name: docComment
inputs.description: One-sentence summary of the document verification result.

inputs.name: partyResult
inputs.description: Party screening verdict: PASS, FAIL, or REVIEW.

inputs.name: partyComment
inputs.description: One-sentence summary of the party screening result.

inputs.name: portResult
inputs.description: Port readiness verdict: PASS, FAIL, or REVIEW.

inputs.name: portComment
inputs.description: One-sentence summary of the port readiness check.

inputs.name: reviewDecision
inputs.description: Human review decision if a check was escalated, e.g. APPROVE or REJECT. Empty string if no human review occurred.

inputs.name: reviewComment
inputs.description: Human reviewer's note explaining the review decision. Empty string if no human review occurred.

outputs.name: closureSummary
outputs.description: Human-readable prose closure summary for a Release Manager. One clean professional paragraph (4-6 sentences). Leads with the outcome in capitals (RELEASED, RELEASED WITH OVERRIDE, REJECTED). No bullet points, no headers, no JSON.

data.description: ReleaseCoordinatorAgent writes closureSummary. Sets releaseOutcome=RELEASED (or RELEASED_WITH_OVERRIDE if a review approved).

data.label: Party Review

inputs.description: One-sentence summary of the party screening result.

inputs.name: portResult
inputs.description: Port readiness verdict: PASS, FAIL, or REVIEW.

inputs.name: portComment
inputs.description: One-sentence summary of the port readiness check.

inputs.name: reviewDecision
inputs.description: Human review decision if a check was escalated, e.g. APPROVE or REJECT. Empty string if no human review occurred.

inputs.name: reviewComment
inputs.description: Human reviewer's note explaining the review decision. Empty string if no human review occurred.

outputs.name: closureSummary
outputs.description: Human-readable prose closure summary for a Release Manager. One clean professional paragraph (4-6 sentences). Leads with the outcome in capitals (RELEASED, RELEASED WITH OVERRIDE, REJECTED). No bullet points, no headers, no JSON.

data.description: Terminal. Sets releaseOutcome=REJECTED, runs ReleaseCoordinatorAgent for closureSummary, exits case.
